Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3308-09-01
Supply Mined Materials to Azimuth Biotech
Azimuth Biotech launches a mining campaign to deliver raw materials to the Glorious Prospect megaship in LHS 157, seeking to rebuild corporate infrastructure after being forced out of Maia, Merope and Qarato.
3308-07-25
Azimuth Condemns 'Alien-Loving' Resistance
Azimuth Biotech director Torben Rademaker condemns Operation Wych Hunt protestors as alien-loving traitors after Azimuth assets are expelled from Merope and Qarato and Hind Mine is attacked.
3307-12-14
Thargoids Repulsed from Three Systems
Salvation's anti-xeno superweapons successfully repel Thargoid vessels from Delphi, Maia and Merope during Operation Tri-hammer, with pilots now asked to help repair damaged starports.
3307-12-09
Support Salvation's Counterstrike Against the Thargoids
Salvation requests urgent deliveries of classified experimental equipment to three megaships in Delphi, Maia and Merope to deploy anti-xeno superweapons against Thargoid invasions.
